race.description: Coffs Cup On Sale Mdn Plate
race.comment: SATIN AND CASH (10) is also knocking on the door and can improve sharply with the blinkers going on. Been well supported throughout this prep and gets another good chance to get off the mark. NO WOMAN NO CRY (2) disappointed fresh in his stable debut but is open to sharp improvement with that run out of the way. PACIFIC REEL (13) was too bad to be true last start when dropping right out but his form prior was good. Is drawn to advantage and can give a bold sight. Don't underestimate. REDLAND BAY (3) was better in his second outing when warming nicely late to grab third. Is open to further improvement.
